name: Varsity Transit Inc
fmcsa_address: 2345 87th St, East Elmhurst, NY 11369 (per Yellow Pages / Yelp; not confirmed via SAFER)
entity_status: active (per NY DOS public record summary; legacy school-bus operations reportedly ceased 2003 per Queens Chronicle / Wikipedia)
registry_source: New York Department of State Division of Corporations (apps.dos.ny.gov/publicInquiry) - entity Varsity Transit, Inc., domestic business corporation, Queens County, Date of Organization 11/19/1965, current status Active; registered address 444 Merrick Rd Ste 370, Lynbrook, NY 11563

Legacy Varsity Transit operated NYC school bus routes from Sept 1965 and ceased school bus operations ~2003 per news/Wikipedia; an affiliated entity (Varsity Coach Inc / Varsity Transit) still listed at 2345 87th St, East Elmhurst NY 11369 per Yelp (updated May 2026) and YellowPages. NY DOS shows the corporation as still 'Active'. No confirmed current USDOT number found; if any active operation exists today it may be intrastate-only and below USDOT registration threshold, or under a different operating entity name.
